prompt:
Validate the Phase 8 build pipeline implementation. Spec at .agentic/specs/09-phase8-build-spec.md — read it and validate alignment.

What was done:
1. tsup installed as devDependency, tsup.config.ts created with two entry points (library ESM+CJS+dts + CLI binary bundled)
2. package.json updated: main→dist/index.cjs, module→dist/index.js, types→dist/index.d.ts, dual exports, bin→dist/bin.js, files→dist/, engines→node>=20, build script added
3. bin.ts shebang removed (tsup banner handles it)
4. No Bun-specific APIs needed replacing — codebase was already using node:fs/promises

Developer claims: 549 tests pass, typecheck clean, lint clean, build produces dist/ correctly, node dist/bin.js --help works, both CJS and ESM imports work.

Your tasks:
1. Run ALL quality gates (typecheck, lint, format:check, test:coverage) — verify 549 tests, 1950 assertions
2. Verify bun run build succeeds and produces all expected dist/ files (index.js, index.cjs, index.d.ts, index.d.cts, bin.js, sourcemaps)
3. Test node dist/bin.js --help and --version
4. Verify the built package can be imported both as CJS and ESM in a clean directory
5. Verify the built CLI binary actually works end-to-end: init a tracker, create an issue, list issues, view issue
6. Check tsup.config.ts matches the spec requirements
7. Check package.json exports/bin/files/engines match the spec
8. Report any issues or gaps
